Our self-serve booking and payment hardware enables hospitality venues to boost bookings, streamline guest flow, and free staff for higher-value services.

For Every Hospitality Venue

From boutique hotels to international airports, Workaround fits seamlessly into your flow.

🏨 Hotels

Seamless check-in/check-out experiences

🍽️ Restaurants

Tableside ordering and payments

🎭 Theatres

Quick ticket purchasing and collection

✈️ Airports

Self-service check-in and bag drop

🏛️ Museums

Digital ticketing and visitor management

🏋️ Spa & Fitness

Class bookings and membership management

Why Choose Workaround?

Lightning Fast

Process bookings in under 30 seconds with our optimized hardware and software stack. No more long queues.

Contactless First

Support for all major contactless payment methods including Apple Pay, Google Pay, and NFC cards.

Easy Integration

Seamlessly connects with your existing PMS, POS, and reservation systems via RESTful APIs.

Real-Time Analytics

Gain insights into customer behavior, peak times, and revenue optimization with our dashboard.

Bank-Level Security

PCI-DSS compliant with end-to-end encryption. Your data and your customers' data is always safe.

24/7 Monitoring

Our IoT platform monitors device health remotely. We fix issues before they impact your operations.

How It Works

Get started in four simple steps

1

Request Access

Join our pilot program. A representative will visit and qualify your venue for early access at no cost.

2

Hardware Setup

We ship a set of 10 devices with recharging dock and activate your free plan with pre-configured settings.

3

Quick Integration

Connect with your existing systems in minutes.

4

Go Live

Customers can now reserve, check-in, and pay securely at any physical location, simply by tapping their phone.
